comment: Character-creation data, extracted verbatim from sizzle/src/content/character-creator.twee (blurbs, bonuses, tags) and sizzle/src/story/variables.twee (setup.backgrounds/firstNames/surnames/codenames). Background ids are the exact twee $player.background strings — ink conditionals and extract variants compare against them.

backgrounds.title: RCMP Constable
backgrounds.blurb: Three years posted to a detachment in Northern Ontario. Long shifts, domestic calls, highway patrols, the occasional missing person report that didn't add up. You were good at your job — steady, observant, hard to rattle.

backgrounds.title: CSIS Analyst
backgrounds.blurb: Intelligence analysis in Ottawa. You read reports, cross-referenced data, identified patterns no one else saw. You were never in the field — you were the person the field reported to.

backgrounds.title: Grad Student (Psychology)
backgrounds.blurb: Master's program at York, clinical psychology. Your thesis on coercive persuasion and interpersonal influence caught the Branch's attention — interesting enough to recruit you before you finished.

backgrounds.title: Unemployed After University
backgrounds.blurb: BA from Ryerson, no job prospects, a lot of student debt, and too much free time spent in places your parents wouldn't approve of. You learned things about people — and about yourself — that don't go on a resume.

incidents.title: The Toronto Blackout
incidents.blurb: Thursday, August 14, 2003. The night the lights went out, you were the one who lit a match.

incidents.title: The Dark of Manitoulin
incidents.blurb: August 2003. A lakehouse on Manitoulin Island. A ritual that was not supposed to work.

incidents.id: the Woman with the Pale Eyes
incidents.title: The Woman with the Pale Eyes
incidents.blurb: August 2003. A hotel lobby in Ottawa. Heavy rain. Wrong eyes.

incidents.title: Wet Dog Smell
incidents.blurb: August 2003. A roadside motel. Something in the dark outside.
